title: christella abrupta
intro: Christella abrupta, also known as the abrupt sword fern, is a type of evergreen fern native to tropical regions of the world. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Christella abrupta include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as relieving pain and reducing inflammation. In herbal preparations, Christella abrupta is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional remedies for its antiseptic and expectorant properties.
